mapper.select: SELECT n.*, COALESCE(s.read_status, 0) AS read_status, COALESCE(s.ack_status, 0) AS ack_status FROM notification_record n LEFT JOIN user_notification_state s ON n.id = s.notification_id AND s.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.type = 'ALERT' AND n.require_ack = 1 AND n.expire_time > #{now} AND COALESCE(s.ack_status, 0) = 0 ORDER BY n.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_record (type, level, title, content, project_id, node_id, source_type, source_id, require_ack, broadcast, create_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{type}, #{level}, #{title}, #{content}, #{projectId}, #{nodeId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{requireAck}, #{broadcast}, #{createTime}, #{expireTime})
